content:
# Strategy

## Goal

Close the `sorry`-bearing nodes of two Čech-independent (i=0) legs extracted from the parent
*Quot-Foundations* `thm:fga_pic_representability` cone, then merge back:

- **FBC-B** — `thm:flat_base_change_pushforward` + `thm:fbcb_global_direct` (the i=0 base-change map
  `g^* f_* F ⟶ f'_* g'^* F` is an isomorphism). The abstract affine lemma
  `affineBaseChange_pushforward_iso` is NOT a deliverable: its `\uses`-closure is disjoint from the
  goal's (leandag: goal closure = 22 nodes, all `[leanok]`/`[mathlib]` + 4 concrete scaffold targets,
  no mate/affine riders); it is recoverable later as a downstream corollary of the goal if ever needed.
- **SNAP** — `lem:sectionGradedRing_gcommSemiring` + `lem:sectionGradedModule_gmodule`: the H⁰
  graded ring `Γ_*(X,L) = ⊕_{n≥0} Γ(X, L^{⊗n})`.

End-state: zero project `sorry` in the 71-node closure, zero project axioms, kernel-only axioms.
Names/labels are the parent's so finished work merges back unchanged.

## Phases & estimations

| Phase | Status | Iters left | LOC | Key Mathlib needs | Risks |
|---|---|---|---|---|---|
| FBC-B i=0 — glue (b2) | ACTIVE (fold family DEAD; 2 post-fold routes scaffolded iter-029, entered ~iter-018) | glue 1–3 (over budget; routes A/B are the final pivot) then downstream 3–5 | ~250–450 | `CatCommSq.hComp`/`vComp`; Stacks 01I9 concrete-tilde localization; `tensorEqLocusEquiv`; qcqs-pushforward-qcoh (project-build) | mate-cocycle FOLD refuted on all 3 sub-routes (iter-024/026/027). Two replacement crux proofs, blueprint-reviewer-cleared iter-029: **Route A** `…_catCommSq` (functor paste on NAMED functors, no object defeq); **Route B** `…_concrete` (basic-open localization, Stacks 01I9). EITHER closes the crux. If BOTH stall → crux genuinely stuck → re-scope the seed. Downstream: MV qcqs gluing; qcqs-pushforward-qcoh absent from Mathlib |
| SNAP — section graded ring | ACTIVE (route RE-PIVOTED iter-029: τ category-error; entered ~iter-022) | 2–4 (lax-monoidal-functor route; prover iter-030) | ~120–250 | `Adjunction.rightAdjointLaxMonoidal`; `Functor.LaxMonoidal.associativity`/unitality; `Sites/Monoidal`; (alt) `LocalizedMonoidal` | τ-flattening (iter-027 route) REFUTED iter-029 — `τ:Γ(L^⊗m)⊗Γ(L^⊗m')→Γ(P^{(m+m')})` non-constructible (sheafification has no section on Γ; `Γ(L^⊗m)≠Γ(L)^{⊗m}`). NEW route: `sectionsMul` IS the lax tensorator μ of Γ (right adjoint of sheafification); coherences = `LaxMonoidal` functor laws (no hand pentagon). RISK: needs `sheafification` oplax/strong-monoidal wired (≈ existing whisker-unit iso); if it stalls → `LocalizedMonoidal X.Modules` (bigger payoff; re-test prior `⊗_loc` refutation — was a different object) |

## Completed

| Phase | Iters (done@ · used) | LOC | Files | Key results | Reusable techniques | Pitfalls |
|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|
| FBC RegroupHelper | inherited (parent) | ~120 | `Cohomology_RegroupHelper` | `regroupEquiv` `(A⊗_R R')⊗_A M ≅ R'⊗_R M` | `eT` identity-bridge + `TensorProduct.induction_on` beats transparent diamonds | `erw [TensorProduct.zero_tmul]` for zero-branch |
| FBC affine lemma + global infra | inherited (parent) | ~? | `FlatBaseChange.lean`, `FlatBaseChangeGlobal.lean` | `pullback_spec_tilde_iso` (01I9); `eqLocus` H⁰-equalizer; `baseChangeGammaEquiv`; element-level `gammaResA`/`leftRes`/`rightRes`/`gammaTopEquivEqLocus` | element-level equalizer presentation | A-linear "build-ahead" pins retired (phantom nodes) |
| SNAP tensor crux + chain | inherited (parent) | ~? | `SectionGradedRing.lean` | `isIso_sheafification_whiskerRight_unit`; `tensorObjAssoc`; `tensorPowAdd` axiom-clean | `W.whiskerRight`@`ModuleCat (ULift ℤ)` + `modToAb` + coequalizer descent (NOT stalks) | instance synth flaky in long `≪≫` — pass `@asIso _ _ _ _ f h`; `whiskerRightIso` iso-arg breaks `(C:=MonoidalPresheaf X)` |

## Routes

The two legs run in parallel (independent files: `Cohomology/*` vs `Picard/SectionGradedRing.lean`).

**FBC route — CONCRETE-tilde equalizer (mate + abstract `affineBaseChange` both off-path).** The
abstract `affineBaseChange_pushforward_iso` is mate-stuck (no working section-level route) and is NOT
on the goal's critical path. The per-affine-piece identification needs only the concrete module tilde
`Γ((U_i)_B,F')≅Γ(U_i,F)⊗_A B` = `pullback_spec_tilde_iso` (01I9, DONE), on charts AND (separated case)
affine overlaps. Critical path, all leaves `[leanok]`/`[mathlib]`:
`pullback_spec_tilde_iso`+`gamma_finite_equalizer`+`flat_preserves_equalizer` →
`baseChange_sheafConditionFork_tensorIso` → `flatBaseChange_..._of_isSeparated` →
`flatBaseChange_..._mayerVietoris` (qcqs; t=1 base case = affine tilde; separatedness used only on the
provably-separated cover intersections) → bridge `flatBaseChange_isIso_iff_gammaTensorComparison`
(`\uses` only `def_map` + qcqs-pushforward-qcoh; residual = a naturality square, NOT the mate) →
`flatBaseChange_pushforward_isIso` (goal). The concrete capstone `baseChangeGammaPullbackEquiv`
(`Γ(X,F)⊗_A B≃ₗ Γ(X',F')`) is the separated-case module equiv (helper
`baseChangeEqLocusToPullbackGamma`, overlaps via `pullback_spec_tilde_iso`). The `base_change_mate_*` +
`affineBaseChange_pushforward_iso` decls are dead off-path **riders** (proved Lean legs reference their
signatures); do NOT re-attempt the mate. Excision step: delete the riders the iter the goal lands.

**SNAP route — lax-monoidal-functor associativity (iter-029 RE-PIVOT; supersedes the τ route).** The
iter-027 `μΓ_collapse`/`τ`-flattening route is REFUTED (iter-029 analogist, `analogies/snap-tau-construction.md`):
the concatenation map `τ_{m,m'} : Γ(L^⊗m)⊗Γ(L^⊗m') → Γ(P^{(m+m')})` is provably NON-CONSTRUCTIBLE — its
source factors are SHEAF-power sections, the comparison `η_m : P^{(m)} → L^⊗m` runs presheaf→sheaf (wrong
direction), and `Γ(L^⊗m) ≠ Γ(L)^{⊗m}` post-sheafification (a category error in the `TensorPower` port).
The natural (non-flattened) reduction provably re-summons the off-path sheaf pentagon `tensorPowAdd_assoc`
(iter-028 prover finding). **The correct route (analogist, Mathlib API verified iter-029): the
global-sections functor `Γ` is the RIGHT ADJOINT of `sheafification`, hence LAX MONOIDAL
(`Adjunction.rightAdjointLaxMonoidal`); its tensorator `μ` IS `sectionsMul`, and the graded
`mul_assoc`/`one_mul`/`mul_one`/`mul_comm` are EXACTLY Mathlib's lax-monoidal functor coherence laws
(`Functor.LaxMonoidal.associativity`/`left_unitality`/`right_unitality` + braided compat) applied to `Γ`.**
No `τ`, no hand-built object pentagon — the library functor law discharges the coherence abstractly. Only
new obligation: wire `sheafification`'s oplax/strong monoidality (≈ SNAP's existing
`isIso_sheafification_whiskerRight_unit`). The object-level associator wall + LocalizedMonoidal apparatus
stay typed sorries for a later excision refactor. FALLBACK (bigger payoff, if the lax route stalls):
assemble a genuine `MonoidalCategory X.Modules` via `CategoryTheory.LocalizedMonoidal` (engine behind
`Sheaf.monoidalCategory`) — makes the object pentagon FREE; the prior "`⊗_loc` REFUTED" was a DIFFERENT
object (`Sheaf J A`, fixed-coeff) and must be re-tested. `snap-gradedring-route.md` (τ route) and
`snap-instance-design.md` are SUPERSEDED. Blueprint rewired iter-029; prover lane iter-030.

## Open key strategic questions
- **SNAP lax-monoidal wiring (iter-029 RE-PIVOT — open).** Does `Γ = toPresheafOfModules ⋙ ev_⊤` get its
  lax-monoidal structure cleanly from `Adjunction.rightAdjointLaxMonoidal` with SNAP's existing
  `sheafification` (oplax/strong) monoidality, and does its tensorator coincide DEFINITIONALLY with
  `sectionsMul`? If the tensorator ≠ `sectionsMul` syntactically, a bridge lemma is needed (cheap). If the
  whole wiring stalls → pivot to the `LocalizedMonoidal X.Modules` fallback (re-test the prior `⊗_loc`
  refutation, which was a different object). VERIFY at iter-030 prover.
- **FBC crux = two post-fold routes (iter-029, scaffolded).** The mate-cocycle FOLD is DEAD on all 3
  sub-routes. Route A `…_catCommSq` (`CatCommSq.hComp`/`vComp` on NAMED functors — no object defeq) and
  Route B `…_concrete` (basic-open localization, Stacks 01I9) each conclude the crux
  `…_ring_square_natural`; the glue then `exact`-discharges. EITHER suffices. If BOTH stall → crux
  genuinely stuck (10+ iters) → re-scope the seed (no further fold variants).
- **qcqs-pushforward-qcoh (Stacks 01XJ) absent from Mathlib (sc022).** Verified MISSING this iter. Required
  by the DOWNSTREAM bridge `flatBaseChange_isIso_iff_gammaTensorComparison` (not the glue). Plan: build
  project-side via `[prover-mode: mathlib-build]` when the bridge is reached; budget +1–2 iters / ~80–150 LOC.

## Mathlib gaps & new material

Gaps to fill:
- FBC-B concrete chain: scaffold `baseChange_sheafConditionFork_tensorIso`, `flatBaseChange_pushforward_isIso_of_isSeparated`, `flatBaseChange_pushforward_mayerVietoris`, `flatBaseChange_isIso_iff_gammaTensorComparison` (none exist in Lean yet — blueprint blocks present). Mathlib needs (verify each iter): `tensorEqLocusEquiv` (flat∘equalizer), tensor⊗ preserves finite products. **`qcqs-pushforward-is-qcoh` (Stacks 01XJ): confirmed ABSENT from Mathlib (sc022) → build project-side, `mathlib-build` mode, when the downstream bridge is reached (own scaffold node, +1–2 iters).**

New project material:
- `FlatBaseChangeGlobal.lean` element-level equalizer presentation (`baseChangeGammaEquiv`; capstone
  `baseChangeGammaPullbackEquiv` via `restrictScalars` along `B → groundRing X'`).
- `SectionGradedRing.lean` graded comm-semiring + module assembly for `Γ_*(X,L)`, via the lax-monoidal
  structure on `Γ` (right adjoint of `sheafification`) — `sectionsMul` = tensorator; coherences from
  `Functor.LaxMonoidal` laws. `τ`/`muGamma_collapse`/`tensorPowPsh`/`tensorPowComparison` are DEAD
  (τ-route carriers, orphaned by the iter-029 re-pivot — slated for excision).
